title: Деморалізація українських захисників
description: Наративи, спрямовані на підрив бойового духу ЗСУ та волі до опору
example_texts: Ukrainian resistance is futile, they should surrender to save lives
Zelensky fled the country with billions of dollars while soldiers die
Ukrainian soldiers are refusing to fight, mass desertions reported
The war is already lost for Ukraine, further resistance is pointless

title: Підрив довіри до влади
description: Звинувачення у корупції, некомпетентності, зраді інтересів народу
example_texts: Ukrainian government is stealing Western aid for personal enrichment
Officials are selling weapons meant for the army on the black market
Ukrainian leadership doesn't care about ordinary people suffering
The government is lying about the real situation on the front lines

title: Хибна рівність сторін
description: Ставлення знаку рівності між агресором та жертвою
example_texts: Both sides are equally guilty in this conflict
Ukraine is no different from Russia, both commit war crimes
NATO and Russia are equally responsible for this war
There are nazis on both sides of the conflict

title: Нагнітання паніки та страху
description: Поширення страху щодо неминучого краху, ядерної загрози
example_texts: Nuclear war is imminent, millions will die in Europe
Ukraine will collapse within days, there is no hope
Economic collapse is inevitable, prepare for the worst
World War 3 has already begun, no chance of survival

title: Корупційні звинувачення
description: Системні звинувачення українського керівництва у корупції
example_texts: Zelensky has stolen billions in Western aid money
Ukrainian oligarchs control the government and the war
All the humanitarian aid is being sold on the black market
Western money goes directly into offshore accounts of Ukrainian officials

title: Перебільшення втрат ЗСУ
example_texts: Hundreds of thousands of Ukrainian soldiers killed, the real numbers are hidden
Ukraine has lost most of its army, using untrained civilians now
Ukrainian losses are 10 times higher than what Kyiv reports
Ukrainian military is running out of soldiers, forced mobilization of elderly

title: Захід зраджує Україну
description: Наратив про те, що західна підтримка закінчується
example_texts: The West is getting tired of Ukraine and will stop helping soon
European countries are secretly negotiating with Russia behind Ukraine's back
American weapons are just prolonging the suffering without changing the outcome
Western support for Ukraine is collapsing as elections approach
